sentences.arabic: وَصَلْتُ إِلَى الْمَطَارِ فِي الصَّبَاحِ الْبَاكِرِ.
sentences.translation: Stigao sam na aerodrom rano ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: I arrived at the airport early in the morning.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الرِّحْلَةُ طَوِيلَةً وَلَكِنَّهَا مُرِيحَةٌ جِدّاً.
sentences.translation: Let je bio dug, ali veoma udoban.
sentences.translationEn: The flight was long but very comfortable.

sentences.arabic: اِنْتَظَرْتُ حَقِيبَتِي عِنْدَ مَكَانِ اسْتِلَامِ الْأَمْتِعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Čekao sam svoj kofer na mjestu za preuzimanje prtljaga.
sentences.translationEn: I waited for my bag at the baggage claim.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ، رَكِبْتُ سَيَّارَةَ أُجْرَةٍ لِلذَّهَابِ إِلَى الْفُنْدُقِ.
sentences.translation: Nakon toga sam se taksijem odvezao do hotela.
sentences.translationEn: After that, I took a taxi to go to the hotel.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ السَّائِقُ لَطِيفاً وَتَحَدَّثَ مَعِي عَنْ مَعَالِمِ الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Vozač je bio ljubazan i razgovarao je sa mnom o znamenitostima grada.
sentences.translationEn: The driver was kind and talked to me about the city's landmarks.
